THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLLITON, AMBER D. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 501 FIRST STREET, SUITE 305, S.F., STAYED UNTIL JAN-27-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WILL NOT RECOVER RENT & DAMAGES THRU 1/27/98. DEFT WAIVES ALL CLAIMS. DEFT IS SOLE OCCUPANT. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT BEHIND DEEMED ABANDONED. IF DEFT RETURNS KEYS TO OFFICE BY 12 NOON 1/27/98 PLTF WILL VACATE JUDGMENT & DISM ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO FURTHER STAYS.
